revisionslider-preference-disable: Ha muujin slider-ka dib u eegista
revisionslider-desc: Waxay muujisaa slider u oggolaanaya xulashada iyo isbarbardhigga dib u eegisyada bogga isbeddelka
revisionslider-toggle-label: Si is dhexgal ah u baadh taariikhda
revisionslider-minoredit: Kani waa wax ka beddel yar
revisionslider-loading-failed: Slider-ka dib u eegista wuu fashilmay in uu soo shubmo.
revisionslider-turn-on-auto-expand-title: Mar walba fidi slider-ka dib u eegista
revisionslider-turn-off-auto-expand-titl: Si toos ah ha u fidin slider-ka dib u eegista
revisionslider-help-dialog-slide1: Slider-ka dib u eegista wuxuu kaa caawinayaa inaad dhex marato oo isbarbardhigto dib u eegisyada bogga isbeddelka. Wuxuu ku saleysan yahay [//meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/WMDE_Technical_Wishes/RevisionSlider rabitaan bulshada] oo ka yimid liiska rabitaannada farsamo ee bulshada Jarmalka ku hadasha. Fikrad-celinta aad bay muhiim u tahay waxaana lagu bixin karaa [//www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension_talk:RevisionSlider halkan].
revisionslider-help-dialog-slide2: Bar kasta waxay matalaysaa dib u eegis bog. Baararka sare waxay muujinayaan kororka cabbirka bogga, halka baararka hoose ay muujinayaan dhimista. Sawirka, dib u eegista 1 waxay matalaysaa waxyaabo lagu daray, halka dib u eegista 2 ay matalayso waxyaabo laga saaray.
revisionslider-help-dialog-slide3a:
Si aad u isbarbardhigto dib u eegisyo gaar ah, ku xulo dib u eegisyada adigoo adeegsanaya labada badhan ee midabbada leh.

Badhanka kore wuxuu maamulaa dib u eegista cusub, halka badhanka hoose uu la xiriira dib u eegista hore.

U dhaqaaji badhannada adigoo jiidaya ama adigoo gujinaya khadka slider-ka.
revisionslider-help-dialog-slide4: Isticmaal fallaadhaha hore iyo gadaal si aad ugu dhex socoto taariikhda dib u eegista oo aad u muujiso dib u eegisyo hore iyo kuwa cusub.
revisionslider-tutorial: Cashar barashada slider-ka dib u eegista
